---
#title: "Danny Campbell"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: img/avatar.jpg
#  image-width: 30em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: "<iconify-icon icon='bi:envelope-at-fill'></iconify-icon> Email"
      url: "mailto:danny.campbell@stir.ac.uk"
#      icon: envelope-at-fill
    - text: "{{< bi microsoft-teams >}} MS Teams"
      url: "https://teams.microsoft.com/l/chat/0/0?users=danny.campbell@stir.ac.uk"
#      icon: microsoft-teams
    - text: "{{< fa graduation-cap >}} Google Scholar"
      url: "https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=Dvb7y5gAAAAJ&hl=en"
#      icon: mortarboard-fill
#    - text: "<iconify-icon icon='devicon:twitter'></iconify-icon> X"
#      icon: twitter
 #     url: "https://twitter.com/DCampbell_econ"
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/danny-campbell"
    - text: "{{< fa brands orcid >}} ORCID iD"
      url: "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7467-2318"
#      icon: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      url: "https://linkedin.com/in/dannycampbell"
      icon: linkedin
comments: false
---

<script src="https://code.iconify.design/iconify-icon/1.0.7/iconify-icon.min.js"></script>

<style>
body {
  background-image: url("img/navbar.png");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-attachment: fixed;  
  background-size: 100%
}
</style>

<div style = "text-align: left;">
I'm a professor of economics at the Economics Division of the University of Stirling Management School. I'm an environmental economist with a research focus on the economic valuation of environmental and natural resources. I also study preference elicitation for public health services, and food choice analysis. My research interests include behavioural and econometric aspects associated with people's choices, such as decision rules, preference heterogeneity, experimental design and spatial issues.
</div>
